description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Push to nuget pre-release that triggers on a workflow dispatch with a pre-release tag input. The workflow should run on an ubuntu-latest environment, check out the repository, determine the next version number based on existing tags, install .NET 8 preview, update the version number in a specific C# file, pack a .NET solution with a custom version, and push the resulting NuGet packages to NuGet.org using a provided API key.
